text: I feel a sense of isolation and curiosity in this dimly lit space. The silence is almost palpable, and the glow from emergency lighting heightens my awareness of my surroundings. The words on the wall—R + D—suggest a place of innovation, yet the darkness transforms this area into something enigmatic and slightly unsettling. It is as though time stands still here, inviting quiet contemplation and a heightened sensitivity to every small detail.
